## Description

Describe the change and the user or operator impact.

## Related Issue(s)

Link the relevant issue, task, or planning document.

## Milestone

- [ ] Link this PR to the appropriate milestone (`Phase 2: Redesign` for phase 2 work)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Redesign
- [ ] Chore

## Phase 2 Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Tailwind tokens reviewed when UI changed
- [ ] `npm run gen:types` run when schema changed
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Screenshots attached for visible UI changes

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out migrations, env changes, route contracts, or follow-up work.
